title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detected (Linux)
description: Detects Linux privilege escalation attempts (sudo -i/-s, SUID changes, pkexec abuse).
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT QIDNAME(qid) AS event_name, sourceip AS source_ip, username AS target_user, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS log_source, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%sudo -i%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%sudo -s%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%chmod 4755%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%chmod u+s%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%pkexec%' ) ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
